auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Diffbot API token sent with the token query parameter. Copy it from the account menu in the Diffbot app.

actions.name: extract_article
actions.description: Extract article content and metadata from a public URL using Diffbot Article API.

url.description: The public article URL to extract with Diffbot.

items.description: An optional Diffbot article field to request.

fields.description: Optional Diffbot article fields to include in the response.

timeout.description: The upstream page retrieval timeout in milliseconds.

renderDelay.description: The extra delay in milliseconds before extraction.

scroll.description: The scrolling mode Diffbot should use to trigger lazy-loaded content.

proxy.description: The custom proxy IP address Diffbot should use to fetch the target page.

proxyAuth.description: The proxy authentication string sent with the custom proxy.

useProxy.description: Whether Diffbot should force its default proxy or disable proxy usage.

paging.description: Whether Diffbot should automatically concatenate multi-page articles.

maxTags.description: The maximum number of auto-generated tags to return.

tagConfidence.description: The minimum relevance score required for returned tags.

categoryConfidence.description: The minimum relevance score required for returned categories.

discussion.description: Whether Diffbot should extract article comments and discussions.

items.description: A Diffbot Natural Language feature to enable.

naturalLanguage.description: The Diffbot Natural Language features to enable for the article.

summaryNumSentences.description: The maximum number of summary sentences when summary analysis is enabled.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for extracting one article from a public URL with Diffbot.

pageUrl.description: The target page URL echoed by Diffbot.

api.description: The Diffbot API family that handled the request.

version.description: The Diffbot API version used for the request.

anyOf.description: The top-level request metadata returned by Diffbot.

type.description: The Diffbot object type for the extracted page.

pageUrl.description: The canonical page URL extracted from the article.

text.description: The extracted plain text content of the article.

date.description: The article publication date returned by Diffbot.

humanLanguage.description: The language code returned by Diffbot.

items.description: A Diffbot object with provider-specific fields.

images.description: The images returned by Diffbot for the article.

items.description: A Diffbot object with provider-specific fields.

tags.description: The topic tags returned by Diffbot.

items.description: A Diffbot object with provider-specific fields.

categories.description: The content categories returned by Diffbot.

naturalLanguage.description: A Diffbot object with provider-specific fields.

anyOf.description: The normalized primary article extracted from the Diffbot article endpoint.

humanLanguage.description: The language code returned at the top level.

title.description: The top-level title returned by Diffbot.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Diffbot article extraction response.
